choices.text: Associated Token Account: deterministic PDA per (owner, mint). associated_token::mint + associated_token::authority. Wallet-standard; predictable. Recoverable by recomputing.
token::authority = vault_authority where vault_authority is a PDA from your program. PDA signs withdrawals via new_with_signer + seeds. Program controls funds; no private key risk.

questions.explanation: PDA as token authority = program-owned vault.

choices.text: SPL mint (0 decimals, supply 1) + Metaplex Metadata (name, symbol, uri, royalties) + Master Edition (uniqueness) + token account. Metaplex Token Metadata standard.
Compressed NFTs (cNFTs) via Bubblegum. Merkle trees store data; ~$0.0001 per mint vs. $0.01 regular. 1M+ feasible. DAS API for reading; standard wallets need cNFT support.

SIWS (Sign-In With Solana) for auth + server checks on-chain balance + continuously verify (don't grant permanent access). On-chain feature gating via Anchor constraints rejects calls without holdings.

questions.explanation: SIWS + backend verify + continuous check + on-chain constraints.
